metadata.description: Resource ID of the Application Insights component

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🎂 Kakeklar – User Engagement

Cookieless Application Insights – no cookies, no personal identifiers, IP masked. Use the time range below to filter."}},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"tr","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":2592000000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000},{"durationMs":7776000000}]}}],"style":"pills"}},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Engasjement over tid"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"union customEvents, pageViews
| summarize ["Økter"] = dcount(session_Id) by bin(timestamp, 1d)","size":0,"title":"Aktive økter per dag","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"timechart"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| summarize Hendelser = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)","size":0,"title":"Hendelser per dag","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"pageViews
| summarize Visninger = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)","size":0,"title":"Sidevisninger","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"timechart"}},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Hva brukerne gjør"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| summarize Antall = count() by name
| sort by Antall desc","size":1,"title":"Topp hendelser","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| where name in ('plan_shared','plan_printed','config_opened','config_changed','price_lookup','suggested_guests_used','allergy_toggled','party_type_changed','pwa_installed')
| summarize Antall = count() by name
| sort by Antall desc","size":1,"title":"Nøkkelhandlinger","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"table"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| where name == 'plan_shared'
| summarize Antall = count() by tostring(customDimensions.method)","size":0,"title":"Delemetode","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"piechart"}},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Hvilke bursdager planlegges"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| where name == 'party_configured'
| extend alder = toint(customDimensions.age)
| where isnotnull(alder)
| summarize Bursdager = count() by alder
| sort by alder asc","size":0,"title":"Fordeling: barnets alder","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| where name == 'party_configured'
| extend gjester = toint(customDimensions.guests)
| where isnotnull(gjester)
| summarize Bursdager = count() by gjester
| sort by gjester asc","size":0,"title":"Fordeling: antall gjester","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"barchart"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"customEvents
| where name == 'party_configured'
| summarize Antall = count() by tostring(customDimensions.partyType)","size":0,"title":"Type feiring (hjemme vs barnehage)","timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","visualization":"piechart"}}]}
